title: Database schema + ORM setup (account isolation, tone profile, drafts)

task.description: Add Prisma schema + db client for users, one tone_profile per user, and drafts history with editable text. Enforce isolation via userId filters and unique constraint on tone_profiles.userId.
acceptance_criteria: Prisma schema includes users, tone_profiles (userId unique), and drafts with createdAt/updatedAt.
DB migration runs successfully and prisma client can query tables.
Attempting to create a 2nd tone_profile for same user fails at DB constraint level.
All draft/tone queries in helper functions require userId and filter by it.
Draft model stores generatedText and editedText (nullable) and updates updatedAt on edit.

covers: One-time tone training enforced in DB
definition_of_done: Prisma client generated and imported from src/lib/db.ts
Query helpers documented with userId requirement
